ABI: insert(bytes32 proofHash, bytes32 metadata) \u2192 (bytes32 newRoot, uint256 leafIndex)"},"test_correctVerifyEncoding()":{"notice":"Document the correct encoding for MerkleTreeVerify precompile.         ABI: verify(bytes32, bytes32, uint256, bytes32[32], bytes32) \u2192 (bool)"},"test_gasReport_isVerified()":{"notice":"Gas benchmark: isVerified"},"test_gasReport_registerProof()":{"notice":"Gas benchmark: registerProof (via coordinator.submitProof)"},"test_multipleProofs_merkleConsistency()":{"notice":"Test multiple proof registrations maintain consistency"},"test_registerProof_fullFlow()":{"notice":"Test registerProof with mocked MerkleInsert \u2014 validates contract logic"}},"notice":"Integration tests for ProofRegistry \u2194 MerkleTree precompile encoding.     ENCODING FINDINGS (Sprint 2, Task 6.5):     MerkleTreeInsert (ProofRegistry.registerProof):       Current:  merkleInsertPrecompile.staticcall(abi.encodePacked(leafHash, metadataHash))       Issues:         1. Missing 4-byte function selector (precompile routes by selector)         2. Uses staticcall but precompile rejects readOnly (insert mutates tree state)       Fix:         - Use CALL instead of STATICCALL         - Use abi.encodeWithSelector(INSERT_SELECTOR, leafHash, metadataHash)         - Data layout for (bytes32, bytes32) is identical with/without encodePacked,           so only the selector and call type need to change.     MerkleTreeVerify (ProofRegistry.isVerified):       Current:  merkleVerifyPrecompile.staticcall(raw1152bytes)       Issues:         1. Missing 4-byte function selector       Note:         - The 1152-byte layout IS the correct ABI encoding for           (bytes32, bytes32, uint256, bytes32[32], bytes32) \u2014 all static types.         - Only the 4-byte selector is missing. STATICCALL is correct (verify is read-only).       Fix:         - Prepend the verify function selector to the targetSenders().details: Returns sender allowlist configured via `targetSender` (empty means no sender allowlist).

test_correctVerifyEncoding().notice: Document the correct encoding for MerkleTreeVerify precompile.         ABI: verify(bytes32, bytes32, uint256, bytes32[32], bytes32) → (bool)

test_multipleProofs_merkleConsistency().notice: Test multiple proof registrations maintain consistency

test_registerProof_fullFlow().notice: Test registerProof with mocked MerkleInsert — validates contract logic
